creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://portsfallout.com/fallout?port=x11%2Fnvidia-driver-470%24> no fallout in recent weeks. 

Via <https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/builds?type=package&all=1> main-amd64 sorted by date: 

<http://beefy18.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=main-amd64-default&build=p34cc6c5bcc7c_s08b05de1e2> in progress, x11/nvidia-driver-470 queued, not yet begun. 

(In reply to andy from comment #0)

> FreeBSD FBSD14 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #33 
> main-n258023-1e8a0a30537: Thu Sep 15 12:24:03 EDT 2022
>      root@FBSD14:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/MYKERNEL amd64 1400067

If you update the OS, then are the same build errors reproducible?
